## Summary

Describe the key change and why it was needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] Built locally
- [ ] Tested affected flows manually
- [ ] Added/updated tests if applicable

## Screenshots or recordings

Add visuals for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No obvious regressions introduced
